## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Environment details
- OS: [e.g. iOS, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
- DayniteJs version: [e.g. 1.1.0]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here. (Screenshots, codesandbox links, etc.)
